basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Office Assistant, Attender and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Watchman cum Gardener, Office Assistant, Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen, Attender/Sub Staff
basic_details.short_information: The Central Bank of India has officially announced the Watchman cum Gardener, Office Assistant, Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen, Attender/Sub Staff Recruitment 2026 with various openings. The detailed notification was published at centralbank.bank.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 22 to 65 years and hold qualifications ranging from 7th Standard, 10th Standard to Graduate can now submit their offline applications from now to 04-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 22 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age relaxation is not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Watchman cum Gardener: Passed 7th Standard; experience preferably in agriculture/gardening/horticulture. Office Assistant: Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge; knowledge in Basic Accounting preferred; fluent in spoken and written local language; proficient in MS Office (Word and Excel), Tally & Internet; skill in typing in local language essential. Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen: Graduate in any discipline from recognized university; computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language. Attender/Sub Staff: Matriculate/10th Standard passed; well conversant with the local language.

salary_details.counselor flc bhopal raisen: Rs. 25000/- p.m. or last pay & allowances drawn less pension (whichever is lower) plus Rs. 1000/- p.m. for Mobile, Conveyance

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:centralbank.bank.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Central Bank of India Various Posts at RSETI Raisen recruitment is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Various Posts at RSETI Raisen?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Various Posts at RSETI Raisen by the Central Bank of India. These vacancies are distributed across different posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 22 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years. Specific age relaxation details, if any, should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 7th Standard and 10th Standard to Graduate degrees like BSW, BA, or B.Com. Specific details are provided for each post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 12,000/- per month for the Watchman cum Gardener post to Rs. 25,000/- per month for the Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen post, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Various Posts at RSETI Raisen will be based on a Personal Interview. Candidates shortlisted after the initial screening will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Central Bank of India for various posts at RSETI Raisen.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. Direct links to download the PDF and apply are provided there.
